tasks.name: Task 1
tasks.code:
# You are given the following matrix
# Write 3 functions that does below tasks:
# Task 1 - calculate the sum of a specific row
# Task 2 - calculate the sum of a specific column
# Task 3 - calculate the sum of the main diagonal

matrix = [
    [2, 4, 6],
    [1, 3, 5],
    [7, 8, 9]
]
